summary: Completed backend API regression + frontend E2E flow validation for landing, auth/signup, onboarding, dashboard, readings, daily insights, and account. All tested flows passed in this run.
action_items: Optional hardening: upgrade ChartCreate model fields from plain strings to strict date/time types for stronger API-level validation
critical_code_review_comments: ChartCreate uses string fields for birth_date/birth_time; malformed date/time strings could pass schema validation and fail deeper in calculation logic
seed_data_creation: Created one TEST_ prefixed user and one chart via API during test run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_api_core.py uses public preview URL from frontend/.env and currently passes 11/11. Frontend flow was validated end-to-end with real signup + onboarding + chart generation.
rca of the issue: No production bug reproduced in this run. Only hardening note: weak input typing in ChartCreate may allow invalid date/time payloads to reach calculation layer.
